topics.title: Understanding Intelligence
topics.content:
Imagine this...

You open Google Maps and it suggests the best route.

Machines don’t think like humans. They follow patterns from data and make decisions based on that.

This is what we call intelligence in machines.

questions.question: Which statements correctly describe machine intelligence?

options.text: Machines act based on data and patterns
Machines take actions based on input

questions.explanation: Machine intelligence is about recognizing patterns and acting based on data.

topics.title: AI vs ML vs Deep Learning
topics.content:
Artificial Intelligence is the full system.

Machine Learning is the part that learns from data.

Deep Learning is an advanced subset of machine learning.
